series_metadata.series_description: (A) These files are used to administer and enforce the provisions and requirements of Chapters 3715, 3719, 4729, and 2925 of the Revised Code. The principle purpose of these files is for the enforcement of the Pharmacy Practice Act, the laws governing the legal distribution of drugs in Ohio and provide a standard automated processing procedure for issuance and renewal of pharmacist licenses. (B) These files contain information on the status of Ohio Pharmacists with respect to: (1) Personal and employment records; (2) Professional records (academic and experience); (3) Public legal records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper: Retain in agency until scanned, unless 3 years after a lapse or failed to renew then shred. ; Electronic: Electronic: Retain on server for 3 years after lapse or failed to renew then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
